name: MCP Control Surface
objective: Allow a Co-architect to plan, inspect, submit, decide, cancel, and resume governed work through stable MCP tools without bypassing authorization or approval contracts.
scope: official Go MCP SDK integration and stdio transport
eight versioned governed control tools and compatibility fixtures
tenant- and repository-scoped authorization before persistence
replay-safe commands with correlated success and failure audit events
transactional PostgreSQL migration for Sprints, decisions, and governed command evidence
fail-closed authenticated loopback HTTP boundary for the legacy kernel API
deterministic fake clients, PostgreSQL integration tests, and migration concurrency tests
out_of_scope: worker process supervision and Codex CLI execution
remote public HTTP exposure or TLS termination
semantic retrieval, graph projection, and context brokering
author: codex
independent_validator: GitHub Actions, CodeRabbit status context, and isolated Codex CLI reviews
